Discontinuities in the value of this counter can occur at  re-initialization of the management system, and at other  times as indicated by the value of  transportSessionDiscontinuityTime.  Note that this parameter corresponds to  ipfixTransportSessionOptionsTemplates in the IPFIX MIB  module.

Name: /ipfix:ipfix/ipfix:exportingProcess/ipfix:destination/ipfix:tcpExporter/ipfix:transportSession/ipfix:transportSessionStartTime
Description: Timestamp of the start of the given Transport  Session.  This state parameter does not correspond to any object in  the IPFIX MIB module.

Name: /ipfix:ipfix/ipfix:exportingProcess/ipfix:destination/ipfix:tcpExporter/ipfix:transportSession/ipfix:transportSessionDiscontinuityTime
Description: Timestamp of the most recent occasion at which  one or more of the Transport Session counters suffered a  discontinuity.  Note that this parameter functionally corresponds to  ipfixTransportSessionDiscontinuityTime in the IPFIX MIB  module.  In contrast to  ipfixTransportSessionDiscontinuityTime, the time is  absolute and not relative to sysUpTime.

Name: /ipfix:ipfix/ipfix:exportingProcess/ipfix:destination/ipfix:tcpExporter/ipfix:transportSession/ipfix:template/ipfix:templateId
Description: This number indicates the Template ID in the IPFIX  message.  Note that this parameter corresponds to ipfixTemplateId in  the IPFIX MIB module.

Name: /ipfix:ipfix/ipfix:exportingProcess/ipfix:destination/ipfix:tcpExporter/ipfix:transportSession/ipfix:template/ipfix:accessTime
Description: Used for Exporting Processes, this parameter  contains the time when this (Options) Template was last  sent to the Collector(s) or written to the file.  Used for Collecting Processes, this parameter contains the  time when this (Options) Template was last received from the  Exporter or read from the file.  Note that this parameter corresponds to  ipfixTemplateAccessTime in the IPFIX MIB module.

Name: /ipfix:ipfix/ipfix:exportingProcess/ipfix:destination/ipfix:tcpExporter/ipfix:transportSession/ipfix:template/ipfix:templateDataRecords
Description: The number of transmitted or received Data  Records defined by this (Options) Template.  Discontinuities in the value of this counter can occur at  re-initialization of the management system, and at other  times as indicated by the value of  templateDiscontinuityTime.  Note that this parameter corresponds to  ipfixTemplateDataRecords in the IPFIX MIB module.

Name: /ipfix:ipfix/ipfix:cache/nokia-ipfix:template-id
Description: This number indicates the Template ID associated with this  Cache.

Name: /ipfix:ipfix/ipfix:exportingProcess/ipfix:destination/ipfix:tcpExporter/nokia-ipfix:username
Description: Username to be sent in the first template while communicating  with the collector. This is used by the collector to validate  the exporter. If username received by the collector does not  match the expected value, collector will terminate the session  with the exporter.

Name: /ipfix:ipfix/ipfix:exportingProcess/ipfix:destination/ipfix:tcpExporter/nokia-ipfix:password
Description: Password to be sent in the first template while communicating  with the collector. This is used by the collector to validate  the exporter. If password received by the collector does not  match the expected value, collector will terminate the  session with the exporter. SHA-512 hashing algorithm will be  used for encryption.

Name: /ipfix:ipfix/nokia-ipfix:collection-timestamp
Description: Timestamp to indicate the data collection time of the instance of data.  It is used only as part of the exported data to the collector.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-disk:volume-resource-data/nokia-disk:volume-resource-list/nokia-disk:name
Description: The name of the volume or partition.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-itf-tm:speed-monitoring/nokia-itf-tm:data/nokia-itf-tm:history/nokia-itf-tm:measured-time
Description: Reports the amount of time, measured in seconds,  that statistics for this interval have been counted.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-itf-tm:speed-monitoring/nokia-itf-tm:data/nokia-itf-tm:history/nokia-itf-tm:invalid-data-flag
Description: Reports the validity of the corresponding PM data.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-itf-tm:speed-monitoring/nokia-itf-tm:data/nokia-itf-tm:history/nokia-itf-tm:time-stamp
Description: Reports the start date/time for this interval.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-itf-tm:speed-monitoring/nokia-itf-tm:data/nokia-itf-tm:history/nokia-itf-tm:receive-datarate
Description: The data rate of Ethernet frames received on the  interface per second. When the period is larger than 1  second then the data rate provides the avarage over the time  period.

Name: /sys:system-state/sys:platform/nokia-ietf-system-aug:software-release
Description: A vendor-specific identifier string representing  the release in use.

Name: /sys:system-state/sys:platform/nokia-ietf-system-aug:duid
Description: The DUID identifier of this host.    Actually this identifier is the host's IDevID as used in the X.509  certificate for Call-Home (BBF TR-301 Issue 2, Corrig. 1,  sec. 16.5.1.3).  However it has a one-to-one correspondence to the  true DUID identifier.

Name: /sys:system-state/nokia-ietf-system-aug:ntp-state/nokia-ietf-system-aug:peer/nokia-ietf-system-aug:delay
Description: filter delay: Time in ms between query and response by the server.

Name: /ipfix:ipfix/ipfix:exportingProcess/ipfix:destination/ipfix:tcpExporter/ipfix:transportSession/ipfix:template/ipfix:templateDiscontinuityTime
Description: Timestamp of the most recent occasion at which  the counter templateDataRecords suffered a discontinuity.  Note that this parameter functionally corresponds to  ipfixTemplateDiscontinuityTime in the IPFIX MIB module.  In contrast to ipfixTemplateDiscontinuityTime, the time  is absolute and not relative to sysUpTime.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-itf-tm:speed-monitoring/nokia-itf-tm:data/nokia-itf-tm:history/nokia-itf-tm:transmit-datarate
Description: The data rate of Ethernet frames transmitted on the  interface per second. When the period is larger than 1  second then the data rate provides the avarage over the time  period.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-itf-tm:speed-monitoring/nokia-itf-tm:data/nokia-itf-tm:non-valid-intervals
Description: The number of speed-monitoring-history intervals for which  the data is considered to be invalid or incomplete.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/eth:Ethernet/eth:auto-negotiation/eth:status
Description: The status of the auto-negotiation protocol

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/eth:Ethernet/eth:duplex
Description: The current mode of operation of the IEEE Std 802.3 Ethernet interface.  The value of 'unknown' indicates that the current duplex mode could not be determined.  The value of 'full' indicates that the IEEE Std 802.3 Ethernet interface operates in full duplex mode.  The value of 'half' indicates that the IEEE Std 802.3 Ethernet interface operates in half duplex mode.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:rx-power-high-alarm
Description: Indicates the high alarm threshold value that is considered for raising rx-power alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:rx-power-high-warning
Description: Indicates the high warning threshold value that is considered for raising rx-power alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:rx-power-low-alarm
Description: Indicates the low alarm threshold value that is considered for raising rx-power alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:rx-power-low-warning
Description: Indicates the low warning threshold value that is considered for raising rx-power alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:temperature-high-alarm
Description: Indicates the high alarm threshold value that is considered for raising tca alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:temperature-high-warning
Description: Indicates the high warning threshold value that is considered for raising tca alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:temperature-low-alarm
Description: Indicates the low alarm threshold value that is considered for raising tca alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:temperature-low-warning
Description: Indicates the low warning threshold value that is considered for raising tca alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:tx-bias-high-alarm
Description: Indicates the high alarm threshold value that is considered for raising tca alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:tx-bias-high-warning
Description: Indicates the high warning threshold value that is considered for raising tca alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:tx-bias-low-alarm
Description: Indicates the low alarm threshold value that is considered for raising tca alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:tx-bias-low-warning
Description: Indicates the low warning threshold value that is considered for raising tca alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:tx-power-high-alarm
Description: Indicates the high alarm threshold value that is considered for raising tca alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:tx-power-high-warning
Description: Indicates the high warning threshold value that is considered for raising tca alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:tx-power-low-alarm
Description: Indicates the low alarm threshold value that is considered for raising tca alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:tx-power-low-warning
Description: Indicates the low warning threshold value that is considered for raising tca alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:voltage-high-alarm
Description: Indicates the high alarm threshold value that is considered for raising tca alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:voltage-high-warning
Description: Indicates the high warning threshold value that is considered for raising tca alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:voltage-low-alarm
Description: Indicates the low alarm threshold value that is considered for raising tca alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:voltage-low-warning
Description: Indicates the low warning threshold value that is considered for raising tca alarms.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:system-load/bbf-cpu-rs:average-system-load-1-min
Description: The average calculated system load over the last minute.  System load is a measurement of CPU over or under  utilization, i.e., the number of processes in the running  or waiting state. Some systems (like Linux) includes  processes in the uninterruptible sleep state (e.g., those  waiting for other system resources like disk I/O).

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:system-load/bbf-cpu-rs:average-system-load-5-min
Description: The average calculated system load over the last five  minutes. System load is a measurement of CPU over or  under utilization, i.e., the number of processes in the  running or waiting state. Some systems (like Linux)  includes processes in the uninterruptible sleep state  (e.g., those waiting for other system resources like disk  I/O).

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:system-load/bbf-cpu-rs:average-system-load-15-min
Description: The average calculated system load over the last fifteen  minutes. System load is a measurement of CPU over or  under utilization, i.e., the number of processes in the  running or waiting state. Some systems (like Linux)  includes processes in the uninterruptible sleep state  (e.g., those waiting for other system resources like disk  I/O).

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:percent-cpu-usage/bbf-cpu-rs:percent-cpu-core-processes
Description: The percentage of time that the CPU was used for  processes.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:percent-cpu-usage/bbf-cpu-rs:percent-cpu-user
Description: The percentage of time that CPU was used for user  processes.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:percent-cpu-usage/bbf-cpu-rs:percent-cpu-idle
Description: The percentage of time that CPU was idle.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:percent-cpu-usage/bbf-cpu-rs:percent-cpu-hwio
Description: The percentage of time that CPU was serving hardware  interrupts.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:percent-cpu-usage/bbf-cpu-rs:percent-cpu-io
Description: The percentage of time that CPU core was waiting for I/O  operations.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:percent-cpu-usage/bbf-cpu-rs:percent-cpu-nice
Description: The percentage of time that CPU core was used for  priority upgrade nice.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:percent-cpu-usage/bbf-cpu-rs:percent-cpu-swint
Description: The percentage of time that CPU core was serving  software interrupts.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:memory-usage/bbf-cpu-rs:used-mem
Description: The amount of memory, in kibibytes, currently in  use.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:memory-usage/bbf-cpu-rs:total-memory
Description: The total amount of memory in kibibytes.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:memory-usage/bbf-cpu-rs:free-memory
Description: Total free memory in kibibytes.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:memory-usage/bbf-cpu-rs:buffer-memory
Description: Total buffer memory in kibibytes.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:memory-usage/bbf-cpu-rs:total-swap-memory
Description: Total swap memory in kibibytes.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:memory-usage/bbf-cpu-rs:used-swap
Description: The amount of swap memory, in kibibytes, currently in  use.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:memory-usage/bbf-cpu-rs:free-swap
Description: Total free swap memory in kibibytes.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-cpu-rs:cpu-processor-data/bbf-cpu-rs:memory-usage/bbf-cpu-rs:available-mem
Description: Total available memory in kibibytes.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/hw:state/hw:standby-state
Description: The standby state for this component.    Some components will exhibit only a subset of the  remaining standby state values.  If this component  cannot operate in a standby role, the value of this node  will always be 'providing-service'.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/hw:sensor-data/hw:value-type
Description: The type of data units associated with the  sensor value

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/hw:sensor-data/hw:value-scale
Description: The (power of 10) scaling factor associated  with the sensor value

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/hw:sensor-data/hw:value-precision
Description: The number of decimal places of precision  associated with the sensor value

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/hw:sensor-data/hw:oper-status
Description: The operational status of the sensor.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/hw:sensor-data/hw:units-display
Description: A textual description of the data units that should be  used in the display of the sensor value.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/hw:sensor-data/hw:value-timestamp
Description: The time the status and/or value of this sensor was last  obtained by the server.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/hw:sensor-data/hw:value-update-rate
Description: An indication of the frequency that the server updates  the associated 'value' node, representing in  milliseconds.  The value zero indicates:   - the sensor value is updated on demand (e.g.,     when polled by the server for a get-request),   - the sensor value is updated when the sensor     value changes (event-driven),   - the server does not know the update rate.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:clei-code
Description: Common Language Equipment Identifier code.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/nokia-ipv6-sppr:ipv6-security-statistics/nokia-ipv6-sppr:interface/nokia-ipv6-sppr:name
Description: The name of a VLAN sub-interface.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/nokia-ipv6-sppr:ipv6-security-statistics/nokia-ipv6-sppr:interface/nokia-ipv6-sppr:ipv6-statistics/nokia-ipv6-sppr:in-ipv6-packet-discards
Description: The number of IPv6 packets received on the interface that  are discarded because of the source IP address of the  incoming packet is not assigned to the interface.    Discontinuities in the value of this counter can occur  at re-initialization of the management system, and at  other times as indicated by the value of  'interfaces-state/interfaces/statistics/  discontinuity-time'.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/nokia-ipv6-sppr:ipv6-security-statistics/nokia-ipv6-sppr:interface/nokia-ipv6-sppr:ipv6-statistics/nokia-ipv6-sppr:in-nd-mac-mismatch-discards
Description: The number of ND packets received on the interface that are        discarded because the MAC address in the Source Link-layer Address        option or Target Link-layer Address option does not match any MAC        address learned on this VSI.          Discontinuities in the value of this counter can occur        at re-initialization of the management system, and at        other times as indicated by the value of        'interfaces-state/interfaces/statistics/        discontinuity-time'.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/nokia-ipv6-sppr:ipv6-security-statistics/nokia-ipv6-sppr:interface/nokia-ipv6-sppr:ipv6-statistics/nokia-ipv6-sppr:in-nd-source-mac-source-link-layer-address-mismatch-discards
Description: The number of ND packets received on the interface that are         discarded because the MAC address in the Source Link-Layer         Address option is not the same as Ethernet source MAC address.           Discontinuities in the value of this counter can occur         at re-initialization of the management system, and at         other times as indicated by the value of         'interfaces-state/interfaces/statistics/         discontinuity-time'.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/nokia-ipv6-sppr:ipv6-security-statistics/nokia-ipv6-sppr:interface/nokia-ipv6-sppr:ipv6-statistics/nokia-ipv6-sppr:in-nd-source-mac-target-link-layer-address-mismatch-discards
Description: The number of ND packets received in the interface that are discarded         because the MAC address in the Target Link-Layer Address option is         not the same as Ethernet source MAC address.           Discontinuities in the value of this counter can occur         at re-initialization of the management system, and at         other times as indicated by the value of         'interfaces-state/interfaces/statistics/         discontinuity-time'.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/nokia-ipv6-sppr:ipv6-security-statistics/nokia-ipv6-sppr:interface/nokia-ipv6-sppr:ipv6-statistics/nokia-ipv6-sppr:in-nd-target-address-discards
Description: The number of ND packets received on the interface that are        discarded because the IPv6 address in the Target Address field is        not statically configured or dynamically learnt on the VSI.          Discontinuities in the value of this counter can occur        at re-initialization of the management system, and at        other times as indicated by the value of        'interfaces-state/interfaces/statistics/        discontinuity-time'.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/nokia-ipv6-sppr:ipv6-security-statistics/nokia-ipv6-sppr:interface/nokia-ipv6-sppr:ipv6-statistics/nokia-ipv6-sppr:out-neighbor-solicit-packet-forwards
Description: The number of downstream multicast and unicast Neighbor Solicit packets that        are sent out of this interface after selecting the interface using        the Neighbor Discovery relay function.          Discontinuities in the value of this counter can occur        at re-initialization of the management system, and at        other times as indicated by the value of        'interfaces-state/interfaces/statistics/        discontinuity-time'.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/eth:Ethernet/eth:speed
Description: Operational speed setting of the interface

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-if-port-ref:port-layer-if
Description: A list of references to the physical port component used to  support this interface.

Name: /sys:system-state/sys:clock/nokia-ietf-system-aug:sys-up-time
Description: Indicates total measured milliseconds since start of system initialization

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-qos-pol-s:qos-policies/bbf-qos-pol-s:ingress/bbf-qos-pol-s:policy/bbf-qos-pol-s:name
Description: Name of the policy.

Name: /ipfix:ipfix/nokia-ipfix:last-message
Description: Used to indicate the last instance of streamed data of a configured cache for an interval.  It is used only as part of the exported data to the collector.  The last instance will have this value as 'true'.  All other instances will have this value as 'false'.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-qos-pol-s:qos-policies/bbf-qos-pol-s:ingress/bbf-qos-pol-s:policy/bbf-qos-pol-s:classifier/bbf-qos-pol-s:name
Description: Name of the classifier.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-qos-pol-s:qos-policies/bbf-qos-pol-s:egress/bbf-qos-pol-s:policy/bbf-qos-pol-s:name
Description: Name of the policy.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-qos-pol-s:qos-policies/bbf-qos-pol-s:egress/bbf-qos-pol-s:policy/bbf-qos-pol-s:classifier/bbf-qos-pol-s:name
Description: Name of the classifier.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-qos-pol-s:qos-policies/bbf-qos-pol-s:ingress/bbf-qos-pol-s:policy/bbf-qos-pol-s:classifier/nokia-flow-stats:flow/nokia-flow-stats:statistics/nokia-flow-stats:creation-time
Description: The measured system up time in seconds when the policy profile  contains classifier entry within policy whose action is to  count associated to the interface

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-qos-pol-s:qos-policies/bbf-qos-pol-s:ingress/bbf-qos-pol-s:policy/bbf-qos-pol-s:classifier/nokia-flow-stats:flow/nokia-flow-stats:statistics/nokia-flow-stats:duration-active
Description: Total measured time that the flow is active since its creation

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-qos-pol-s:qos-policies/bbf-qos-pol-s:ingress/bbf-qos-pol-s:policy/bbf-qos-pol-s:classifier/nokia-flow-stats:flow/nokia-flow-stats:statistics/nokia-flow-stats:fwd-bytes
Description: The number of bytes forwarded per flow on the interface.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-qos-pol-s:qos-policies/bbf-qos-pol-s:ingress/bbf-qos-pol-s:policy/bbf-qos-pol-s:classifier/nokia-flow-stats:flow/nokia-flow-stats:statistics/nokia-flow-stats:fwd-frames
Description: The number of frames forwarded per flow on the interface.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-qos-pol-s:qos-policies/bbf-qos-pol-s:egress/bbf-qos-pol-s:policy/bbf-qos-pol-s:classifier/nokia-flow-stats:flow/nokia-flow-stats:statistics/nokia-flow-stats:creation-time
Description: The measured system up time in seconds when the policy profile  contains classifier entry within policy whose action is to  count associated to the interface

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-qos-pol-s:qos-policies/bbf-qos-pol-s:egress/bbf-qos-pol-s:policy/bbf-qos-pol-s:classifier/nokia-flow-stats:flow/nokia-flow-stats:statistics/nokia-flow-stats:duration-active
Description: Total measured time that the flow is active since its creation

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-qos-pol-s:qos-policies/bbf-qos-pol-s:egress/bbf-qos-pol-s:policy/bbf-qos-pol-s:classifier/nokia-flow-stats:flow/nokia-flow-stats:statistics/nokia-flow-stats:fwd-bytes
Description: The number of bytes forwarded per flow on the interface.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-qos-pol-s:qos-policies/bbf-qos-pol-s:egress/bbf-qos-pol-s:policy/bbf-qos-pol-s:classifier/nokia-flow-stats:flow/nokia-flow-stats:statistics/nokia-flow-stats:fwd-frames
Description: The number of frames forwarded per flow on the interface.

Name: /dot1q-cfm:cfm/dot1q-cfm:maintenance-group/dot1q-cfm:maintenance-group-id
Description: The maintenance group provides a handle  for the MD and MA combination.

Name: /dot1q-cfm:cfm/dot1q-cfm:maintenance-group/dot1q-cfm:mep/dot1q-cfm:mep-id
Description: Integer that is unique among all the MEPs in the  same Maintenance Association.

Name: /dot1q-cfm:cfm/dot1q-cfm:maintenance-group/dot1q-cfm:mep/dot1q-cfm:stats/dot1q-cfm:mep-lbr-out
Description: Total number of Loopback Replies transmitted.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/cfm-stack:cfm-stack/cfm-stack:cfm-stack/cfm-stack:md-level
Description: The MD level of the maintenance point

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/cfm-stack:cfm-stack/cfm-stack:cfm-stack/cfm-stack:direction
Description: The direction in which the Maintenance Point faces on the  interface. Example, up or down.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/cfm-stack:cfm-stack/cfm-stack:cfm-stack/cfm-stack:mac-address
Description: The MAC address of the Maintenance Point.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/cfm-stack:cfm-stack/cfm-stack:cfm-stack/cfm-stack:mep/cfm-stack:maintenance-group-id
Description: The maintenance group that the MEP is associated with.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/cfm-stack:cfm-stack/cfm-stack:cfm-stack/cfm-stack:mep/cfm-stack:mep-id
Description: Integer that is unique among all the MEPs in the same  Maintenance Association.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/cfm-stack:cfm-stack/cfm-stack:cfm-stack/cfm-stack:mhf/cfm-stack:md-id
Description: The maintenance domain that the MHF is associated with.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/cfm-stack:cfm-stack/cfm-stack:cfm-stack/cfm-stack:mhf/cfm-stack:ma-id
Description: The maintenance association that the MHF is associated  with.

Name: /ipfix:ipfix/nokia-ipfix:cache-sequence-number
Description: Sequence number per cache, applicable only for caches configured as on-change.  It is used only as part of the exported data to the collector.  The sequence number will be incremented by 1 for each data-record for cache (except an audit message)  irrespective of the connection status with the collector.  This will be reset to 0 when an action to trigger complete-data-sync is used, when the fields of the cache is modified or  when ipfix-exporting is disabled.  This number will not be impacted by any change in the connection status with the collector.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-dot1x-ext:pae/nokia-dot1x-ext:port/nokia-dot1x-ext:authentication-status
Description: Contains the status for the authentication of this  user.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-dot1x-ext:pae/nokia-dot1x-ext:port/nokia-dot1x-ext:last-authentication-timestamp
Description: The last date and time of the session creation.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-dot1x-ext:pae/nokia-dot1x-ext:port/nokia-dot1x-ext:last-terminate-cause
Description: The reason for the session termination.

Description: The operational state of the authentication server

Name: /sys:system-state/nokia-radius:radius-statistics/nokia-radius:authentication-server/nokia-radius:server-reply-time
Description: The time interval between the most recent RADIUS Access-Reply or  Access-Challenge and the Access-Request packets that matched from  this authentication server.

Name: /sys:system-state/nokia-radius:radius-statistics/nokia-radius:authentication-server/nokia-radius:access-request-tx
Description: The number of RADIUS Access-Request packets sent to this server  which does not include retransmissions.

Name: /sys:system-state/nokia-radius:radius-statistics/nokia-radius:authentication-server/nokia-radius:access-retransmission-tx

Description: The number of RADIUS Access-Accept packets received from this  authentication server.

Description: The number of RADIUS Access-Reject packets received from this  authentication server.

Name: /sys:system-state/nokia-radius:radius-statistics/nokia-radius:authentication-server/nokia-radius:invalid-access-response-rx
Description: The number of malformed RADIUS Access-Response packets received  from this authentication server.  Note that Malformed packets include packets with an invalid length. Bad  authenticators and unknown types are not included as  malformed access responses.

Name: /sys:system-state/nokia-radius:radius-statistics/nokia-radius:authentication-server/nokia-radius:bad-authenticator-rx
Description: The number of RADIUS Access-Response packets containing invalid  authenticators or signature received from this authentication  server.

Name: /sys:system-state/nokia-radius:radius-statistics/nokia-radius:authentication-server/nokia-radius:pending-request-rx

Name: /sys:system-state/nokia-radius:radius-statistics/nokia-radius:authentication-server/nokia-radius:unknown-packet-rx

Name: /sys:system-state/nokia-radius:radius-statistics/nokia-radius:authentication-server/nokia-radius:packet-discards-rx
Description: The number of RADIUS packets of which are dropped by receiving  from this authentication server.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/hw:state/hw:state-last-changed
Description: The date and time when the value of any of the  admin-state, oper-state, usage-state, alarm-state, or  standby-state changed for this component.    If there has been no change since the last  re-initialization of the local system, this node  contains the date and time of local system  initialization.  If there has been no change since the  component was added to the local system, this node  contains the date and time of the insertion.

Name: /ipfix:ipfix/nokia-ipfix:data-presence-indication
Description: Indicates the presence of real data for each field in the template.  This will always be the first Information Element in every data record.  Bit 0 corresponds to the second field, bit 1 to the third field and so on (no bit assigned for the data-presence-indication).  Bit value 1 indicates that an actual value exists for the field & bit value 0 indicates that the value does not exist & a dummy value is added by the exporter.  An empty value indicates that all fields have real data for the instance.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:name
Description: name of the template.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:transceiver/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:diagnostics/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:temperature
Description: Internally measured transceiver temperature Temperature  accuracy is vendor specific but must be better than +/- 3  degrees Celsius over specified operating temperature and  voltage.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:transceiver/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:diagnostics/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:supply-voltage
Description: Internally measured transceiver supply voltage. Practical  considerations to be defined by transceiver manufacturer  will tend to limit the actual bounds of the supply voltage  measurement. Accuracy is vendor specific but must be better  than +/- 3% of the manufacturer's nominal value over  specified operating temperature and voltage. Note that in  some transceivers, transmitter supply voltage and receiver  supply voltage are isolated. In that case, only one supply  is monitored. Refer to the device specification for more  detail.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:transceiver-link/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:diagnostics/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:tx-bias
Description: Measured TX bias current in mA. Accuracy is vendor specific  but must be better than +/- 10% of the manufacturer's  nominal value over specified operating temperature and  voltage.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:transceiver-link/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:diagnostics/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:tx-power
Description: Measured TX output power in mW. Data is assumed to be based  on measurement of laser monitor photodiode current. It is  factory calibrated to absolute units using the most  representative fiber output type. Accuracy is vendor  specific but must be better than +/- 3dB over specified  temperature and voltage. Data is not valid when the  transmitter is disabled.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:transceiver-link/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:diagnostics/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:rx-power
Description: Measured RX received optical power in mW. Absolute accuracy  is dependent upon the exact optical wavelength. For the  vendor specified wavelength, accuracy shall be better than  +/- 3dB over specified temperature and voltage. This  accuracy shall be maintained for input power levels up to  the lesser of maximum transmitted or maximum received  optical power per the appropriate standard. It shall be  maintained down to the minimum transmitted power minus cable  plant loss (insertion loss or passive loss) per the  appropriate standard. Absolute accuracy beyond this minimum  required received input optical power range is vendor  specific.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:transceiver-link/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:diagnostics/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:laser-temperature
Description: Measured optional laser temperature. The relative and  absolute accuracy are vendor specific but relative laser  temperature accuracy must be better than +/- 0.2 degrees  Celsius. [Relative temperature accuracy refers to the  accuracy of the reported temperature changes relative to the  actual laser temperature changes

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-if-pm-mounted:invalid-data-flag

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-if-pm-mounted:time-stamp
Description: Reports the start date/time for this interval.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-if-pm-mounted:in-octets
Description: The total number of octets received on the interface,  including framing characters.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-if-pm-mounted:in-unicast-pkts
Description: The number of packets, delivered by this sub-layer to a  higher (sub-)layer, that were not addressed to a  multicast or broadcast address at this sub-layer.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-if-pm-mounted:in-broadcast-pkts
Description: The number of packets, delivered by this sub-layer to a  higher (sub-)layer, that were addressed to a broadcast  address at this sub-layer.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-if-pm-mounted:in-multicast-pkts
Description: The number of packets, delivered by this sub-layer to a  higher (sub-)layer, that were addressed to a multicast  address at this sub-layer.  For a MAC-layer protocol,  this includes both Group and Functional addresses.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-if-pm-mounted:in-discards
Description: The number of inbound packets that were chosen to be  discarded even though no errors had been detected to  prevent their being deliverable to a higher-layer  protocol.  One possible reason for discarding such a  packet could be to free up buffer space.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-if-pm-mounted:in-errors
Description: For packet-oriented interfaces, the number of inbound  packets that contained errors preventing them from being  deliverable to a higher-layer protocol.  For character-  oriented or fixed-length interfaces, the number of  inbound transmission units that contained errors  preventing them from being deliverable to a higher-layer  protocol.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-if-pm-mounted:out-octets
Description: The total number of octets transmitted out of the  interface, including framing characters.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-if-pm-mounted:out-unicast-pkts
Description: The total number of packets that higher-level protocols  requested be transmitted, and that were not addressed  to a multicast or broadcast address at this sub-layer,  including those that were discarded or not sent.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-if-pm-mounted:out-broadcast-pkts
Description: The total number of packets that higher-level protocols  requested be transmitted, and that were addressed to a  broadcast address at this sub-layer, including those  that were discarded or not sent.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-if-pm-mounted:out-multicast-pkts
Description: The total number of packets that higher-level protocols  requested be transmitted, and that were addressed to a  multicast address at this sub-layer, including those  that were discarded or not sent.  For a MAC-layer  protocol, this includes both Group and Functional  addresses.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-if-pm-mounted:out-discards
Description: The number of outbound packets that were chosen to be  discarded even though no errors had been detected to  prevent their being transmitted.  One possible reason  for discarding such a packet could be to free up buffer  space.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-if-pm-mounted:out-errors
Description: For packet-oriented interfaces, the number of outbound  packets that could not be transmitted because of errors.  For character-oriented or fixed-length interfaces, the  number of outbound transmission units that could not be  transmitted because of errors.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xpon:channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onus-present-on-local-channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onu/bbf-xpon-onu-s:detected-serial-number
Description: The serial number of the Optical Network Unit (ONU).

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xpon:channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onus-present-on-local-channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onu/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onu-presence-state
Description: State information related to the presence of the Optical  Network Unit (ONU). The most specific applicable identity  should be reported.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xpon:channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onus-present-on-local-channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onu/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onu-id
Description: This is the ITU-T TC layer ONU-ID identifier which the  Optical Network Unit (ONU) is currently using on the channel  group.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xpon:channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onus-present-on-local-channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onu/bbf-xpon-onu-s:detected-registration-id
Description: The registration ID value which the Optical Line Termination  (OLT) has received from the Optical Network Unit (ONU). This  leaf is not present if the ONU has not provided any  registration ID to the OLT. Registration ID may be useful in  identifying a particular ONU installed at a particular  location. Each octet is represented as 2 hexadecimal  characters, therefore the leaf must contain an even number of  characters. For ITU-T G.984.3, the leaf can only be up to  20 octets long (refer to 'password'), for ITU-T G.987.3,  ITU-T G.9807.1, ITU-T G.989.3 and ITU-G G.9804.2,  the leaf can be up to 72 octets long.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xpon:channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onus-present-on-local-channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onu/bbf-xpon-onu-s:v-ani-ref
Description: The virtual Access Network Interface (vANI) corresponding to  this Optical Network Unit (ONU) when configured on this  Optical Line Termination (OLT). This leaf is not present if  no vANI is corresponding to the ONU in the OLT.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xpon:channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onus-present-on-local-channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onu/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onu-detected-datetime
Description: The Optical Line Termination (OLT) system date and time  when the Optical Network Unit (ONU) was detected present  on the channel termination.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xpon:channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onus-present-on-local-channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onu/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onu-state-last-change
Description: The Optical Line Termination (OLT) system date and time  when the 'onu-state' YANG leaf got its current value.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/if:statistics/nokia-sdan-eth-itf-stats:ethernet/nokia-sdan-eth-itf-stats:in-pkts-errors-fcs
Description: A count of frames received on a particular interface that are  an integral number of octets in length but do not pass the  FCS check. This count does not include frames received with  frame-too-long or frame-too-short error.    The count represented by an instance of this leaf is  incremented when the frameCheckError status is returned by  the MAC service to the LLC (or other MAC user). Received  frames for which multiple error conditions pertain are,  according to the conventions of IEEE 802.3 Layer Management,  counted exclusively according to the error status presented  to the LLC.    Note: Coding errors detected by the Physical Layer for speeds  above 10 Mb/s will cause the frame to fail the FCS check.  Discontinuities in the value of this counter can occur at  re-initialization of the management system, and at other  times as indicated by the value of the interface's  'statistics/discontinuity-time'.    A frame that is counted by an instance of this leaf is also  counted by the corresponding instance of  'in-errors' leaf.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xponvani:v-ani/bbf-xponvani:onu-present-on-this-olt/bbf-xponvani:detected-registration-id
Description: The registration ID value which the Optical Line  Termination (OLT) has received from the Optical Network  Unit (ONU). This leaf is not present if the ONU has not  provided any registration ID to the OLT. Registration ID  may be useful in identifying a particular ONU installed  at a particular location. Each octet is represented as 2  hexadecimal characters, therefore the leaf must contain an  even number of characters. For ITU-T G.984.3, the leaf  can only be up to 20 octets long (refer to 'password'),  for ITU-T G.987.3, ITU-T G.9807.1, ITU-T G.989.3, and  ITU-T G.9804.2, the leaf can be up to 72 octets long.

Description: The serial number of the ONU. The serial number  is unique for each ONU.  It contains the vendor  ID and vendor specific serial number.        The first four bytes are an ASCII-encoded      vendor ID four letter mnemonic.        The second four bytes are a binary encoded      serial number, under the control of the ONU      vendor.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-hw-xcvr:transceiver-link/bbf-hw-xcvr:diagnostics/nokia-sdan-hws-xcvr-diagnostics-aug:rssi-onu/nokia-sdan-hws-xcvr-diagnostics-aug:rssi
Description: Received Signal Strength Indication (RSSI). This  is a measurement at the OLT of the averaged  optical power received from a specific ONU  operating in burst mode.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-hw-xcvr:transceiver-link/bbf-hw-xcvr:diagnostics/nokia-sdan-hws-xcvr-diagnostics-aug:rssi-onu/nokia-sdan-hws-xcvr-diagnostics-aug:v-ani-ref
Description: The v-ani interface related to this ONU when  configured on this OLT. This YANG leaf is not  present if no virtual ANI is corresponding to the  ONU in the OLT.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xponvani:v-ani/bbf-xponvani:onu-presence-state
Description: Presence state data which the Optical Line Termination  (OLT) can form about an Optical Network Unit (ONU) for  which a virtual Access Network Interface (vANI) is  configured. The most specific applicable identity should be  reported.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:phy/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:psbd-hec-errors
Description: Hybrid Error Correction (HEC) error in any of the fields of  the Downstream Physical Synchronization Block (PSBd).    For G-PON, not applicable.  For XG-PON, reported per ANI.  For XGS-PON, reported per ANI.  For NG-PON2, reported per ANI.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/if-mounted:name
Description: The name of the interface.    A server implementation MAY map this leaf to the ifName  MIB object.  Such an implementation needs to use some  mechanism to handle the differences in size and characters  allowed between this leaf and ifName.  The definition of  such a mechanism is outside the scope of this document.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/if-mounted:type
Description: The type of the interface.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/if-mounted:admin-status
Description: The desired state of the interface.    This leaf has the same read semantics as ifAdminStatus.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/if-mounted:oper-status
Description: The current operational state of the interface.    This leaf has the same semantics as ifOperStatus.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/if-mounted:last-change
Description: The time the interface entered its current operational  state.  If the current state was entered prior to the  last re-initialization of the local network management  subsystem, then this node is not present.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/if-mounted:if-index
Description: The ifIndex value for the ifEntry represented by this  interface.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/if-mounted:phys-address
Description: The interface's address at its protocol sub-layer.  For  example, for an 802.x interface, this object normally  contains a Media Access Control (MAC) address.  The  interface's media-specific modules must define the bit      and byte ordering and the format of the value of this  object.  For interfaces that do not have such an address  (e.g., a serial line), this node is not present.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/if-mounted:higher-layer-if
Description: A list of references to interfaces layered on top of this  interface.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/if-mounted:lower-layer-if
Description: A list of references to interfaces layered underneath this  interface.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/if-mounted:speed
Description: An estimate of the interface's current bandwidth in bits  per second.  For interfaces that do not vary in  bandwidth or for those where no accurate estimation can  be made, this node should contain the nominal bandwidth.  For interfaces that have no concept of bandwidth, this  node is not present.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:transceiver-link/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:diagnostics/nokia-hw-xcvr-dbm-mounted:tx-power-dbm
Description: Measured TX output power in dBm. Data is assumed to be  based on measurement of laser monitor photodiode current.  It is factory calibrated to absolute units using the most  representative fiber output type. Accuracy is vendor  specific but must be better than +/- 3dB over specified  temperature and voltage.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:transceiver-link/bbf-hw-xcvr-mounted:diagnostics/nokia-hw-xcvr-dbm-mounted:rx-power-dbm
Description: Measured received (RX) optical power in dBm. Absolute  accuracy is dependent upon the exact optical wavelength.  For the vendor specified wavelength, accuracy shall be  better than +/- 3dB over specified temperature and  voltage. This accuracy shall be maintained for input  power levels up to the lesser of maximum transmitted or  maximum received optical power per the appropriate  standard. It shall be maintained down to the minimum  transmitted power minus cable plant loss (insertion  loss  or passive loss) per the appropriate standard. Absolute  accuracy beyond this minimum required received input  optical power range is vendor specific.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xpon:channel-pair/nokia-xponinfra-cac:us-l2-capacity
Description: This represents the upstream capacity of the channel  pair to transport Layer2 Ethernet data.  Layer 2 Ethernet data is to be understood as the  part of the Ethernet frame from the Destination MAC  address, included, up to the Frame Check Sequence (FCS),  included. Ethernet frame details can be found for instance  in IEEE Std 802.3-2018, IEEE Standard for Ethernet,  Section 1, Chapter 3 'Media Access Control (MAC) frame  and packet Specifications'.  Note that because of the xPON transport overhead structure,  this capacity depends on the number of active ONUs, on the  number of configured Services (T-CONTs) on ONUs and on  whether Forward Error Correction (FEC) is used or not.  Also a conventional traffic pattern with an average  frame size of 361 bytes is considered when coping  with xPON framing overhead.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xpon:channel-pair/nokia-xponinfra-cac:ds-l2-capacity
Description: This represents the downstream capacity of the channel  pair to transport Layer2 Ethernet data.  Layer 2 Ethernet data is to be understood as the  part of the Ethernet frame from the Destination MAC  address, included, up to the Frame Check Sequence (FCS),  included. Ethernet frame details can be found for instance  in IEEE Std 802.3-2018, IEEE Standard for Ethernet,  Section 1, Chapter 3 'Media Access Control (MAC) frame  and packet Specifications'.  Note that this capacity depends on whether Forward Error  Correction (FEC) is used or not.  Also a conventional traffic pattern with an average  frame size of 361 bytes is considered when coping  with xPON framing overhead.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-itf-tm:speed-monitoring/nokia-itf-tm:data/nokia-itf-tm:history/nokia-itf-tm:transmit-broadcast-datarate
Description: The data rate of Ethernet frames with as destination MAC  address the Ethernet broadcast address that are transmitted  on the interface. When the period is larger than 1 second  then the data rate provides the avarage over the time  period.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-itf-tm:speed-monitoring/nokia-itf-tm:data/nokia-itf-tm:history/nokia-itf-tm:transmit-multicast-datarate
Description: The data rate of Ethernet frames with as destination MAC  address a multicast MAC address that are transmitted on the  interface. When the period is larger than 1 second then the  data rate provides the avarage over the time period.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-itf-tm:speed-monitoring/nokia-itf-tm:data/nokia-itf-tm:history/nokia-itf-tm:transmit-unicast-datarate
Description: The data rate of Ethernet frames with as destination MAC  address a unicast MAC address that are transmitted on the  interface. When the period is larger than 1 second then the  data rate provides the avarage over the time period.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-vsi-xpon:vsi-ipfix-xpon-info/nokia-vsi-xpon:channel-termination-identifier
Description: The identifier of the channel termination currently used by the ONU  which is corresponding to lower layer vANI of this VLAN sub-interface

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-vsi-xpon:vsi-ipfix-xpon-info/nokia-vsi-xpon:channel-termination-ifindex
Description: IfIndex of channel termination currently used by the ONU  which corresponds to lower layer vANI of this VLAN sub-interface

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-vsi-xpon:vsi-ipfix-xpon-info/nokia-vsi-xpon:onu-last-up
Description: The time that the ONU corresponding to the lower layer vANI of this  VLAN sub-interface has been in operation since the last time it was  connected to the OLT and authenticated.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/nokia-interfaces-performance-management-mounted:in-drop-events
Description: The total number of events in which inbound packets were  dropped due to a lack of resources

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/nokia-interfaces-performance-management-mounted:in-total-pkts
Description: The total number of inbound packets received, including bad  packets, broadcast packets and multicast packets

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-eth-pm-mounted:ethernet/bbf-eth-pm-mounted:in-pkts-errors-fcs
Description: A count of frames received on a particular interface that are  an integral number of octets in length but do not pass the  FCS check. This count does not include frames received with  frame-too-long or frame-too-short error.  The count represented by an instance of this leaf is  incremented when the frameCheckError status is returned by  the MAC service to the LLC (or other MAC user). Received  frames for which multiple error conditions pertain are,  according to the conventions of IEEE 802.3 Layer Management,  counted exclusively according to the error status presented  to the LLC.  Note: Coding errors detected by the Physical Layer for speeds  above 10 Mb/s will cause the frame to fail the FCS check.  Discontinuities in the value of this counter can occur at  re-initialization of the management system, and at other  times as indicated by the value of the interface's  'statistics/discontinuity-time'.  A frame that is counted by an instance of this leaf is also  counted by the corresponding instance of  'in-errors' leaf.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-eth-pm-mounted:ethernet/bbf-eth-pm-mounted:in-undersize-pkts
Description: A count of frames received on a particular Ethernet(-like)  interface that are less than 64 bytes in length, and  are discarded.  This counter is incremented regardless of whether the  frame passes the FCS check.  Discontinuities in the value of this counter can occur at  re-initialization of the management system, and at other  times as indicated by the value of the interface's  'statistics/discontinuity-time'.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-eth-pm-mounted:ethernet/bbf-eth-pm-mounted:in-giant-pkts
Description: A count of frames received on a particular interface that  exceed the maximum permitted frame size.  The count represented by an instance of this leaf is  incremented when the frameTooLong status is returned by the  MAC service to the LLC (or other MAC user). Received frames  for which multiple error conditions pertain are, according to  the conventions of IEEE 802.3 Layer Management, counted  exclusively according to the error status presented to the  LLC.  Discontinuities in the value of this counter can occur at  re-initialization of the management system, and at other  times as indicated by the value of the interface's  'statistics/discontinuity-time'.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/nokia-interfaces-performance-management-mounted:in-64-octets-pkts
