Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/hw-mounted:name
Description: The name assigned to this component.    This name is not required to be the same as  entPhysicalName.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/hw-mounted:class
Description: An indication of the general hardware type of the  component.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/hw-mounted:hardware-rev
Description: The vendor-specific hardware revision string for the  component.  The preferred value is the hardware revision  identifier actually printed on the component itself (if  present).

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/nokia-interfaces-performance-management-mounted:in-drop-octets
Description: The total number of octets dropped on the interface,  including framing characters.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/hw-mounted:mfg-name
Description: The name of the manufacturer of this physical component.  The preferred value is the manufacturer name string  actually printed on the component itself (if present).    Note that comparisons between instances of the model-name,  firmware-rev, software-rev, and the serial-num nodes are  only meaningful amongst component with the same value of  mfg-name.    If the manufacturer name string associated with the  physical component is unknown to the server, then this  node is not instantiated.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/hw-mounted:model-name
Description: The vendor-specific model name identifier string  associated with this physical component.  The preferred  value is the customer-visible part number, which may be  printed on the component itself.    If the model name string associated with the physical  component is unknown to the server, then this node is not  instantiated.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/hw-mounted:serial-num
Description: The vendor-specific serial number string for the  component.  The preferred value is the serial number  string actually printed on the component itself (if  present).    If a serial number has been configured for this component  in /hardware/component/serial-num, this node contains the  configured value.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-vsi-xpon:vsi-ipfix-xpon-info/nokia-vsi-xpon:remote-id
Description: Remote-id value configured in a subscriber-profile, which is  applied to this interface.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xpon:channel-group/bbf-xpon:allocated-downstream-wavelengths/bbf-xpon:wavelength
Description: A downstream wavelength used for 25GS-PON, NG-PON2  or XGS should be reported as a numeric value expressed  in hundredths of nm to fit ITU-T precision requirements.  A wavelength used for XG-PON or G-PON can be reported as  a numeric value expressed in hundredths of nm or  alternately with enum value 'xgpon' or 'gpon',  respectively.  The enum value 'xgs' should be avoided: it makes sense  only when the OLT supports only one of the XGS 'Basic'  or 'Optional' wavelength sets, the 'xgs' enum value is  ambiguous otherwise.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking-nodes-state/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:performance/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:history/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:time-stamp
Description: Reports the start date/time for this interval.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xpon:channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onus-present-on-local-channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onu/nokia-sdan-xpon-onu-state-aug:detected-upstream-rate
Description: The upstream detected rate of the ONU. While this  value makes sense for ONUs connected to any channel  termination, it is especially useful in case the  channel termination is of type XGS-PON and is hosting  dual-rate ONUs.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xponvani:v-ani/bbf-xponvani:onu-present-on-this-olt/bbf-xponvani:onu-fiber-distance
Description: This optional leaf reports Optical Network Unit (ONU) fiber  distance in meters. The measurement method is  implementation-specific. ITU-T recommendated method allows  fiber distance measurement with 1% precision.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/bbf-sim-mounted:software/bbf-sim-mounted:software/bbf-sim-mounted:revisions/bbf-sim-mounted:revision/bbf-sim-mounted:name
Description: The name of the software revision. This is the name used  when the software was downloaded, e.g. filename.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking-nodes-state/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:performance/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:history/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:call-attempt-failures
Description: The total number of failed call attempts.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking-nodes-state/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:performance/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:history/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:call-terminate-failures
Description: The total number of call attempts terminated with a cause.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking-nodes-state/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:performance/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:history/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:maximum-call-setup-duration
Description: A high water-mark that records the longest duration of a  single call set-up detected during this interval. Time is  measured in milliseconds from the time an initial set-up  was requested by the subscriber until the time at which a  response was provided to the subscriber in the form  of busy tone, audible ring tone, etc.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking-nodes-state/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:performance/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:history/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:maximum-off-hook-duration
Description: Records the longest period of a single off-hook  detected on the analogue port. Time is measured  in milliseconds.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking-nodes-state/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:performance/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:history/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:releases-without-dialing
Description: Indicates the number of analog port releases without  dialing detected.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking-nodes-state/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:performance/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:history/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:rtp-packet-errors
Description: The total number of RTP packet errors.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking-nodes-state/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:performance/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:history/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:rtp-packet-loss
Description: The total number of RTP packets lost.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking-nodes-state/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:performance/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:history/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:maximum-time-rtcp-packets
Description: The high-water mark that represents the maximum  time measured between RTCP packets, expressed in  milliseconds.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking-nodes-state/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:performance/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:history/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:maximum-jitter
Description: The high-water mark that represents the maximum jitter  identified during a measured interval, expressed in RTP  timestamp units.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking-nodes-state/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:performance/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:history/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:buffer-underflows
Description: Counts the number of times the reassembly buffer  underflows. In case of continuous underflow caused by a  loss of IP packets, a single buffer underflow should be  counted. If the interworking function is implemented with  multiple buffers, such as a packet level buffer and a bit  level buffer, then underflow of either buffer increments  this counter.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking-nodes-state/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:performance/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:history/nokia-voice-pm-mounted:buffer-overflows
Description: Counts the number of times the reassembly buffer  overflows. If the interworking function is implemented  with multiple buffers, such as a packet level buffer and  a bit level buffer, then overflow of either buffer  increments this counter.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/bbf-xpongemtcont-mounted:xpongemtcont-state/bbf-xpongemtcont-mounted:gemports/bbf-xpongemtcont-mounted:gemport/bbf-xpongemtcont-mounted:name
Description: Name of G-PON Encapsulation Method (GEM) port.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking-nodes-state/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:pots-interworking/bbf-sip-voip-mounted:name
Description: Uniquely identifies the POTS interworking node.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:gemport/nokia-interfaces-performance-management-mounted:lost-in-frames
Description: Total number of received G-PON Encapsulation Method (GEM) frames lost.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:gemport/nokia-interfaces-performance-management-mounted:lost-out-frames
Description: Total number of transmitted G-PON Encapsulation Method (GEM) frames lost.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:gemport/nokia-interfaces-performance-management-mounted:rx-bad-headers
Description: Total number of received G-PON Encapsulation Method (GEM) headers that are bad

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:gemport/nokia-interfaces-performance-management-mounted:rx-gem-blocks
Description: The count of GEM blocks that were received correctly at the monitored GEM port

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:gemport/nokia-interfaces-performance-management-mounted:tx-gem-blocks
Description: The count of GEM blocks originated by the transmitting end point  (i.e., backward reporting is assumed).
The total number of broadcast frames received by the ONU on all Ethernet UNI ports altogether.
The total number of broadcast frames transmitted by the ONU on all Ethernet UNI ports altogether.
The total number of errors detetced on the incoming frames by the ONU on  all Ethernet UNI ports altogether due to CRC align errors, Jabber errors, fragmenetation  errors and collisions.
The total number of outgoing frames dropped by the ONU on all Ethernet UNI ports altogether  due to CRC align errors, Jabber errors, fragmenetation errors and collisions.
The total incoming bit rate measured by the ONU on all Ethernet UNI ports altogether.  The value is an average over the monitoring interval for history and  instant value for current interval.
The total outgoing bit rate measured by the ONU on all Ethernet UNI ports altogether.  The value is an average over the monitoring interval for history and  instant value for current interval.
The total number of octects received by the ONU on all Ethernet UNI ports altogether,  including framing characters.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:lods/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:total-events
Description: Counter of state transitions from O5.1/O5.2 to O6.    For G-PON, not applicable.  For XG-PON, not applicable.  For XGS-PON, reported per ANI.  For NG-PON2, reported per ANI.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:lods/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:restored/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:operating-twdm
Description: Loss of Downstream Synchronization (LODS) cleared  without returning.    For G-PON, not applicable.  For XG-PON, not applicable.  For XGS-PON, reported per ANI.  For NG-PON2, reported per ANI.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:lods/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:onu-reactivation/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:no-sync-reacquired
Description: Either TO2 (without Wavelength Channel Protection (WLCP))  or TO3+TO4 (with WLCP) expire before the downstream  channel is reacquired.    For G-PON, not applicable.  For XG-PON, not applicable.  For XGS-PON, reported per ANI.  For NG-PON2, reported per ANI.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:utilization/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:out-bytes-non-idle-xgem-frames
Description: Measure of downstream utilization.    For G-PON, not applicable.  For XG-PON, not applicable.  For XGS-PON, reported per ANI, v-ANI and CT.  For NG-PON2, reported per ANI, v-ANI and CT

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:utilization/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:in-bytes-non-idle-xgem-frames
Description: Measure of upstream utilization.    For G-PON, not applicable.  For XG-PON, not applicable.  For XGS-PON, reported per ANI, v-ANI and CT.  For NG-PON2, reported per ANI, v-ANI and CT

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-hw-ext:last-self-test-error
Description: Indicates last self test error. As long as there has been no failing selftest, the value of this  Leaf would be 00:00:00:00 Any other value indicates the last failed test information  which needs to be further checked and correlated with OFLT(offline test) document.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xponvani:v-ani/nokia-sdan-if-xponvani-aug:onu-last-down-reason
Description: The reason why ONT went down.This will be updated  whenever oper-status goes from up to down.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/hw:state/nokia-sdan-pst:power/nokia-sdan-pst:state
Description: Data node showing power state of hardware component.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/hw:state/nokia-sdan-pst:power/nokia-sdan-pst:reason
Description: Indicates possible reasons for current power state of  hardware component.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-sdan-ps:power-saving/nokia-sdan-ps:state/nokia-sdan-xpon-ps:applied-xpon-criteria
Description: State data node showing which power saving criteria is  currently met for this hardware component.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/bbf-hw-xcvr:transceiver/bbf-hw-xcvr:identifiers-and-codes/bbf-hw-xcvr:compliance-codes/bbf-hw-xcvr:fibre-channel-transmission-media
Description: Fibre channel transmission media.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-if-pm:performance/nokia-dba-congn-mon:shorter-monitoring-period/nokia-dba-congn-mon:monitoring-period-length
Description: This leaf specifies the short monitoring period for which the performance data  is collected.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-if-pm:performance/nokia-dba-congn-mon:shorter-monitoring-period/nokia-dba-congn-mon:dba-congestion-monitoring/nokia-dba-congn-mon:number-of-intervals
Description: The total number of monitoring-intervals for which  data was collected.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-if-pm:performance/nokia-dba-congn-mon:shorter-monitoring-period/nokia-dba-congn-mon:dba-congestion-monitoring/nokia-dba-congn-mon:non-valid-intervals
Description: The number of monitoring-intervals for which  the data is considered to be invalid or incomplete.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-if-pm:performance/nokia-dba-congn-mon:shorter-monitoring-period/nokia-dba-congn-mon:dba-congestion-monitoring/nokia-dba-congn-mon:history/nokia-dba-congn-mon:interval-number
Description: The position of a completed interval relative to the  current interval. Value '1' corresponds to the last  interval completed

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-if-pm:performance/nokia-dba-congn-mon:shorter-monitoring-period/nokia-dba-congn-mon:dba-congestion-monitoring/nokia-dba-congn-mon:history/nokia-dba-congn-mon:measured-time
Description: Reports the amount of time, measured in seconds,  that statistics for this interval have been counted.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-if-pm:performance/nokia-dba-congn-mon:shorter-monitoring-period/nokia-dba-congn-mon:dba-congestion-monitoring/nokia-dba-congn-mon:history/nokia-dba-congn-mon:invalid-data-flag
Description: Reports the validity of the corresponding PM data.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-if-pm:performance/nokia-dba-congn-mon:shorter-monitoring-period/nokia-dba-congn-mon:dba-congestion-monitoring/nokia-dba-congn-mon:history/nokia-dba-congn-mon:time-stamp
Description: Reports the start date/time for this interval.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-if-pm:performance/nokia-dba-congn-mon:shorter-monitoring-period/nokia-dba-congn-mon:dba-congestion-monitoring/nokia-dba-congn-mon:history/nokia-dba-congn-mon:dba-congestion-ratio
Description: It is the percentage of the elapsed interval during which the  bandwidth assigned by DBA exceeded the configured threshold value

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/nokia-cpu-pm-mgnt-mounted:performance/nokia-cpu-pm-mgnt-mounted:intervals-15min/nokia-cpu-pm-mgnt-mounted:history/nokia-cpu-pm-mgnt-mounted:system-load/nokia-cpu-pm-mgnt-mounted:average-system-load
Description: The average calculated system load over the performance monitoring period.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/nokia-cpu-pm-mgnt-mounted:performance/nokia-cpu-pm-mgnt-mounted:intervals-24hr/nokia-cpu-pm-mgnt-mounted:history/nokia-cpu-pm-mgnt-mounted:memory-usage/nokia-cpu-pm-mgnt-mounted:total-mem
Description: Total memory available in kibibytes(KiB), including free and used.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/nokia-cpu-pm-mgnt-mounted:performance/nokia-cpu-pm-mgnt-mounted:intervals-24hr/nokia-cpu-pm-mgnt-mounted:history/nokia-cpu-pm-mgnt-mounted:memory-usage/nokia-cpu-pm-mgnt-mounted:used-mem
Description: Total memory used in kibibytes(KiB). This is an instantaneous value.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:phy/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:fs-hec-errors
Description: For XG-PON, the XG-PON Transmission Convergence (XGTC)  header Hybrid Error Correction (HEC) errors received.  For XGS-PON and NG-PON2, the Downstream (DS) Framing  Sublayer (FS) header Hybrid Error Correction (HEC) errors  received.    For G-PON, not applicable.  For XG-PON, reported per ANI and v-ANI.  For XGS-PON, reported per ANI and v-ANI.  For NG-PON2, reported per ANI and v-ANI.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:phy/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:unknown-profiles
Description: Count of the instances where the Optical Network Unit (ONU)  could not transmit because the specified burst profile was  unknown.    For G-PON, not applicable.  For XG-PON, reported per ANI.  For XGS-PON, reported per ANI.  For NG-PON2, reported per ANI.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:gemport/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:out-frames
Description: Total number of G-PON Encapsulation Method (GEM) frames  transmitted.    For G-PON, reported per ANI (via OMCI). While not  explicitly defined in G.984.3, implementations may report  this count per CT.  For XG-PON, reported per ANI and CT.  For XGS-PON, reported per ANI and CT.  For NG-PON2, reported per ANI and CT.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:gemport/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:in-frames
Description: Total number of G-PON Encapsulation Method (GEM) frames  received.    For G-PON, reported per ANI (via OMCI). While not  explicitly defined in G.984.3, implementations may report  this count per CT.  For XG-PON, reported per ANI and CT.  For XGS-PON, reported per ANI and CT.  For NG-PON2, reported per ANI and CT.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:gemport/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:out-frames-lf-bit-not-set
Description: Number of transmit fragmentation operations.    For G-PON, not applicable.  For XG-PON, reported per ANI and CT.  For XGS-PON, reported per ANI and CT.  For NG-PON2, reported per ANI and CT.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:gemport/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:fs-frame-words-lost
Description: Aggregate severity measure of the loss of G-PON  Encapsulation Method (GEM) channel delineation events. Note  that the number of lost GEM frames is not available.    For G-PON, not applicable.  For XG-PON, reported per ANI and v-ANI.  For XGS-PON, reported per ANI and v-ANI.  For NG-PON2, reported per ANI and v-ANI.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:gemport/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:key-errors
Description: G-PON Encapsulation Method (GEM) frames discarded because  of unknown or invalid encryption key. Examples include: no  unicast or broadcast key established for specified key  index, key index indicating encrypted GEM frame on an GEM  port that is not provisioned for encryption, key index  indicating upstream encryption on an GEM port that is  provisioned for downstream encryption only, or invalid key  index. This count is included in the 'in-frames' count.    For G-PON, not applicable.  For XG-PON, reported per ANI and v-ANI.  For XGS-PON, reported per ANI and v-ANI.  For NG-PON2, reported per ANI and v-ANI.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:gemport/bbf-xpon-pm-mounted:hec-errors
Description: Number of events involving loss of G-PON Encapsulation  Method (GEM) channel delineation.    For G-PON, not applicable.  For XG-PON, reported per ANI and v-ANI.  For XGS-PON, reported per ANI and v-ANI.  For NG-PON2, reported per ANI and v-ANI.
The total number of octects transmitted by the ONU on all Ethernet UNI ports altogether,  including framing characters.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-eth-pm-mounted:ethernet/bbf-eth-pm-mounted:in-errors-mac-internal
Description: A count of frames for which reception on a particular  IEEE 802.3 Ethernet interface fails due to an internal  MAC sublayer receive error.  A frame is only counted by an instance of this leaf if it  is not counted by the corresponding instance of either the  'in-giant-pkts' leaf, the 'in-pkts-errors-alignment-fcs'  leaf, or the 'in-pkts-errors-fcs' leaf.  The precise meaning of the count represented by an instance  of this leaf is implementation-specific.  In particular, an instance of this leaf may represent a  count of receive errors on a particular IEEE 802.3  Ethernet interface that are not otherwise counted.  Discontinuities in the value of this counter can occur at  re-initialization of the management system, and at other  times as indicated by the value of the interface's  'statistics/discontinuity-time'

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/bbf-eth-pm-mounted:ethernet/bbf-eth-pm-mounted:out-errors-mac-internal
Description: A count of frames for which transmission on a particular IEEE  802.3 Ethernet interface fails due to an internal MAC  sublayer transmit error.  A frame is only counted by an instance of this leaf if it  is not counted by the corresponding instance of either the  'out-collisions-late' leaf, the  'out-pkts-collisions-excessive' leaf, or the  'out-errors-carrier-sense' leaf. The precise meaning of the  count represented by an instance of this leaf is  implementation-specific.  In particular, an instance of this leaf may represent a  count of transmission errors on a particular IEEE 802.3  Ethernet interface that are not otherwise counted.  Discontinuities in the value of this counter can occur at  re-initialization of the management system, and at other  times as indicated by the value of the interface's  'statistics/discontinuity-time'.

Description: Count of messages (other than Acknowledgement)  sent by the Optical Network Unit (ONU), received by  Optical Line Termination (OLT).    For G-PON, reported per ANI and CT.  For XG-PON, reported per ANI and CT.  For XGS-PON, reported per ANI and CT.  For 25GS-PON, reported per ANI and CT.  For NG-PON2, reported per ANI and CT.  For 50G-PON, reported per ANI and CT.
The total number of multicast frames received by the ONU on all Ethernet UNI ports altogether.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xponvani:v-ani/bbf-xponvani:onu-id
Description: This is the ITU-T Transmission Convergence (TC) layer ONU-ID  identifier which the Optical Line Termination (OLT) has  assigned to the Optical Network Unit (ONU) during the ONU's  activation using the Assign_ONU-ID PLOAM message. It  identifies an ONU on a channel group and is unique on a  channel group.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xponvani:v-ani/bbf-xponvani:management-tcont-alloc-id
Description: The ITU-T Transmission Convergence (TC) Allocation ID  (Alloc-ID) of the management T-CONT for the Optical Network  Unit (ONU). It has the same numerical value as the ITU-T TC  ONU-ID.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xponvani:v-ani/bbf-xponvani:management-gemport-id
Description: The ITU-T Transmission Convergence (TC) Id of the management  G-PON Encapsulation Methiod (GEM) port for the Optical  Network Unit (ONU). For NG-PON2, XGS-PON, XG-PON, and  50G-PON, it has the same numerical value as the ITU-T TC  ONU-ID. For G-PON, its value is not necessarily numerically  equal to the ONU-ID.
The total number of multicast frames transmitted by the ONU on all Ethernet UNI ports altogether.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-itf-tm:speed-monitoring/nokia-itf-tm:data/nokia-itf-tm:history/nokia-itf-tm:top-utilized-child-interfaces/nokia-itf-tm:in/nokia-itf-tm:top
Description: top

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-itf-tm:speed-monitoring/nokia-itf-tm:data/nokia-itf-tm:history/nokia-itf-tm:top-utilized-child-interfaces/nokia-itf-tm:in/nokia-itf-tm:child-interface-name
Description: The name of the child interface, of the parent  interface in the /interfaces-state/interface  list that contains this data node, that is  top contributors in transmitting data traffic  over this interface

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-itf-tm:speed-monitoring/nokia-itf-tm:data/nokia-itf-tm:history/nokia-itf-tm:top-utilized-child-interfaces/nokia-itf-tm:in/nokia-itf-tm:in-data-rate
Description: The data rate of Ethernet frames received on  the interface per second.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-itf-tm:speed-monitoring/nokia-itf-tm:data/nokia-itf-tm:history/nokia-itf-tm:top-utilized-child-interfaces/nokia-itf-tm:out/nokia-itf-tm:top
Description: top

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-itf-tm:speed-monitoring/nokia-itf-tm:data/nokia-itf-tm:history/nokia-itf-tm:top-utilized-child-interfaces/nokia-itf-tm:out/nokia-itf-tm:child-interface-name
Description: The name of the child interface, of the parent  interface in the /interfaces-state/interface  list that contains this data node, that is  top contributors in transmitting data traffic  over this interface

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-itf-tm:speed-monitoring/nokia-itf-tm:data/nokia-itf-tm:history/nokia-itf-tm:top-utilized-child-interfaces/nokia-itf-tm:out/nokia-itf-tm:out-data-rate
Description: The data rate of Ethernet frames transmitted  on the interface per second.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xpon:channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onus-present-on-local-channel-termination/bbf-xpon-onu-s:onu/bbf-xpon-onu-auth:detected-loid
Description: The Logical Identifier (LOID) value currently used  by an Optical Network Unit (ONU) that is present on  a channel termination. The OLT could directly  retrieve the LOID from the ONU (if able to do so before  the ONU is authenticated) or indirectly from  the Management Plane via the  'bbf-xpon-onu-auth:report-onu-authentication-results'  action (if the OLT supports it).  This data node is not present if the ONU is not using  any LOID or if the OLT lacks the capability to  query the ONU for its LOID before the ONU is authenticated  and didn't receive it either via the  'bbf-xpon-onu-auth:report-onu-authentication-results' action.  The LOID may be useful in identifying a particular ONU  installed at a particular location, for instance in an  failed ONU replacement scenario.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-xponvani:v-ani/bbf-xponvani:onu-present-on-this-olt/bbf-xponvani-onu-auth:detected-loid
Description: The Logical Identifier (LOID) value currently used  by an Optical Network Unit (ONU) that the Optical  Line Termination (OLT) has successfully authenticated  and has associated to this vANI. The OLT could directly  retrieve the LOID from the ONU (if able to do so before  the ONU is authenticated) or indirectly from  the Management Plane reporting the ONU authentication  results).  This data node is not present if the ONU is not using  any LOID or if the OLT lacks the capability to  query the ONU for its LOID before the ONU is authenticated  and didn't receive it either in an ONU authentication report  from the Management Plane.  The LOID may be useful in identifying a particular ONU  installed at a particular location, for instance in an  failed ONU replacement scenario.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/eth-mounted:Ethernet/eth-mounted:duplex
Description: The current mode of operation of the IEEE Std 802.3 Ethernet interface.  The value of 'unknown' indicates that the current duplex mode could not be determined.  The value of 'full' indicates that the IEEE Std 802.3 Ethernet interface operates in full duplex mode.  The value of 'half' indicates that the IEEE Std 802.3 Ethernet interface operates in half duplex mode.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/eth-mounted:Ethernet/eth-mounted:speed
Description: Operational speed setting of the interface

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-sdan-hw-sens-ext:temperature-sensor-thresholds/nokia-sdan-hw-sens-ext:threshold-high-warning
Description: The threshold is involved in monitoring the system against overheating.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-sdan-hw-sens-ext:temperature-sensor-thresholds/nokia-sdan-hw-sens-ext:threshold-low
Description: The threshold is involved in protecting the system against overcooling. The threshold-low is the threshold to raise the overcool alarm.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-sdan-hw-sens-ext:temperature-sensor-thresholds/nokia-sdan-hw-sens-ext:threshold-low-clear
Description: The threshold is involved in indicating the overcooling is eliminated. The threshold-low-clear is the threshold to clear the overcool alarm.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-sdan-hw-sens-ext:temperature-sensor-thresholds/nokia-sdan-hw-sens-ext:threshold-low-warning
Description: The threshold is involved in monitoring the system against overcooling.

Name: /hw:hardware-state/hw:component/nokia-sdan-hw-sens-ext:temperature-sensor-thresholds/nokia-sdan-hw-sens-ext:threshold-low-warning-clear
Description: The threshold indicates monitoring the system against overcooling is eliminated.
The number of the interval relative to the current interval.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/hw-mounted:state/hw-mounted:admin-state
Description: The administrative state for this component.    This node refers to a component's administrative  permission to service both other components within its  containment hierarchy as well other users of its  services defined by means outside the scope of this  module.  Some components exhibit only a subset of the remaining  administrative state values.  Some components cannot be  locked, and hence this node exhibits only the 'unlocked'  state.  Other components cannot be shutdown gracefully,  and hence this node does not exhibit the 'shutting-down'  state.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/hw-mounted:state/hw-mounted:oper-state
Description: The operational state for this component.    Note that this node does not follow the administrative  state.  An administrative state of down does not predict  an operational state of disabled.    Note that some implementations may not be able to  accurately report oper-state while the admin-state node  has a value other than 'unlocked'.  In these cases, this  node MUST have a value of 'unknown'.

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/hw-mounted:hardware-state/hw-mounted:component/hw-mounted:state/hw-mounted:state-last-changed
Description: The date and time when the value of any of the  admin-state, oper-state, usage-state, alarm-state, or  standby-state changed for this component.    If there has been no change since the last  re-initialization of the local system, this node  contains the date and time of local system  initialization.  If there has been no change since the  component was added to the local system, this node  contains the date and time of the insertion.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/nokia-dot1x-ext:pae/nokia-dot1x-ext:port/nokia-dot1x-ext:session-id
Description: The session ID of the authenticator

Name: /onu:onus/onu:onu/onu:root/if-mounted:interfaces-state/if-mounted:interface/bbf-if-pm-mounted:performance/bbf-if-pm-mounted:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm-mounted:history/nokia-moca-pm-mounted:moca/nokia-moca-pm-mounted:frame/nokia-moca-pm-mounted:out-unknowns

Description: The total number of unknown packets transmitted by ONT at the moca UNI
Reports the amount of time, measured in seconds,  that statistics for this interval have been counted.

Reports the start date/time for this interval.

Name: /if:interfaces-state/if:interface/bbf-if-pm:performance/bbf-if-pm:intervals-15min/bbf-if-pm:history/bbf-xpon-pm:xpon/bbf-xpon-pm:ploam/bbf-xpon-pm:downstream-messages/bbf-xpon-pm:ranging-time
Description: Count of Ranging_Time Physical Layer Operations,  Administrations and Maintenance (PLOAM) messages sent by  the Optical Line Termination (OLT) Channel Termination  (CT).    For G-PON, not applicable.  For XG-PON, reported per ANI, vANI and CT.  For XGS-PON, reported per ANI, vANI and CT.  For 25GS-PON, reported per ANI, vANI and CT.  For NG-PON2, reported per ANI, vANI and CT.  For 50G-PON, reported per ANI, vANI and CT.
